StochasticLoadBalancing := Module[
  {
    (* Work arrival process *)
    𝒲_arrival = PoissonProcess[λ],
    
    (* Service time distribution *)
    𝒮_service = ExponentialDistribution[μ],
    
    (* Queue dynamics as reflected Brownian motion *)
    QueueProcess = ReflectedBrownianMotion[
      Drift → λ - p*μ,  (* p = number of processors *)
      Diffusion → Sqrt[λ + p*μ²*Cv²],  (* Cv = coefficient of variation *)
      Boundary → 0  (* Non-negative queue length *)
    ],
    
    (* Potential function for load balancing *)
    Φ[load_] := Sum[load[i]^2, {i, 1, p}],  (* Minimize variance *)
    
    (* Power-of-d choices algorithm *)
    PowerOfChoices[d_] := Module[
      {
        (* Probability of maximum load *)
        P_max[m] = (1 - (1 - 1/n)^d)^m - (1 - 2/n)^(d*m),
        
        (* Expected maximum load *)
        E_max = Log[n]/Log[d] + O[1],
        
        (* Concentration inequality *)
        P[MaxLoad > E_max + t] <= n * Exp[-d * t²/(2n)]
      },
      
      (* Optimal choice *)
      d_optimal = 2  (* Two-choice paradigm *)
    ],
    
    (* Balls-and-bins martingale *)
    LoadMartingale = Module[
      {
        X_t = LoadVector[t],
        
        (* Doob martingale *)
        M_t = E[Φ[X_T] | ℱ_t] - E[Φ[X_T]],
        
        (* Azuma-Hoeffding bound *)
        P[|M_T - M_0| > λ] <= 2*Exp[-λ²/(2*Sum[c_i², {i}])],
        
        (* Bounded differences *)
        c_i = Max[|E[Φ | ball i → bin j] - E[Φ | ball i → bin k]|]
      },
      
      (* Convergence rate *)
      MixingTime = O[n Log n]
    ]
  },
  
  (* Response time analysis *)
  ResponseTimeDistribution = Module[
    {
      (* M/M/p queue theory *)
      ρ = λ/(p*μ),  (* Utilization *)
      
      (* Erlang C formula *)
      P_wait = (p*ρ)^p/(p!(1-ρ)) / 
               Sum[(p*ρ)^k/k!, {k, 0, p-1}] + (p*ρ)^p/(p!(1-ρ)),
      
      (* Average response time *)
      W_avg = 1/μ + P_wait/(p*μ*(1-ρ)),
      
      (* Tail probability *)
      P[W > t] = P_wait * Exp[-(p*μ*(1-ρ))*t]
    },
    
    Distribution[PDF → p[t], CDF → F[t], Mean → W_avg]
  ]
]

ParallelCorrectnessProof := Module[
  {
    (* Owicki-Gries Proof System *)
    ProofObligations = {
      (* Sequential Correctness *)
      LocalCorrectness := ∀ thread_i: 
        {P_i} C_i {Q_i},
      
      (* Interference Freedom *)
      InterferenceFreedom := ∀ i ≠ j, ∀ statement s_j in C_j:
        {P_i ∧ pre(s_j)} s_j {P_i},
      
      (* Global Invariant Preservation *)
      InvariantPreservation := ∀ i, ∀ s_i in C_i:
        {I ∧ pre(s_i)} s_i {I}
    },
    
    (* Linearizability Verification *)
    LinearizabilityProof = Module[
      {
        (* History of operations *)
        H = Sequence[op_1[t_1], op_2[t_2], ..., op_n[t_n]],
        
        (* Linearization points *)
        LP[op_i] = AtomicOperation[CAS, TestAndSet, FetchAndAdd],
        
        (* Sequential specification *)
        S = SequentialSemantics[DataStructure],
        
        (* Proof obligation *)
        Prove[∃ σ: TotalOrder[Operations]: 
          σ respects H.programOrder ∧
          σ respects H.realTime ∧
          Apply[σ, S] == ObservedBehavior[H]
        ]
      }
    ],
    
    (* Race Condition Detection via Vector Clocks *)
    RaceDetection = Module[
      {
        (* Vector clock for each thread *)
        VC[thread_i] = Table[0, {j, 1, NumThreads}],
        
        (* Update rules *)
        OnEvent[thread_i, event] := Module[{},
          VC[thread_i][[i]]++;
          
          Case[event,
            Send[j] :> Message[j] = VC[thread_i],
            Receive[j, msg] :> VC[thread_i] = Max[VC[thread_i], msg],
            Access[var] :> CheckRace[var, VC[thread_i]]
          ]
        ],
        
        (* Race detection *)
        CheckRace[var, vc_current] := Module[
          {vc_last = LastAccess[var]},
          
          If[!VectorClockOrder[vc_last, vc_current] && 
             !VectorClockOrder[vc_current, vc_last],
            ReportRace[var]
          ]
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  
  (* Model Checking via TLA+ *)
  TLASpecification = Module[
    {
      (* Temporal Logic of Actions *)
      Init == ∀ i ∈ Threads: queue[i] = ⟨⟩,
      
      Push[i, task] == 
        queue' = [queue EXCEPT ![i] = Append[queue[i], task]],
      
      Steal[i, j] == 
        queue[j] ≠ ⟨⟩ ∧
        queue' = [queue EXCEPT 
          ![i] = Append[queue[i], Head[queue[j]]],
          ![j] = Tail[queue[j]]
        ],
      
      Next == ∃ i,j ∈ Threads, task ∈ Tasks:
        Push[i, task] ∨ Steal[i, j],
      
      (* Fairness *)
      Fairness == WF_vars(Next),
      
      (* Safety: No lost tasks *)
      Safety == □(TotalTasks = InitialTasks),
      
      (* Liveness: All tasks eventually complete *)
      Liveness == ◇□(AllQueuesEmpty)
    },
    
    ModelCheck[Init ∧ □[Next]_vars ∧ Fairness ⟹ Safety ∧ Liveness]
  ]
]

ParallelPerformanceMetrics := Module[
  {
    (* Amdahl's Law with Overhead *)
    SpeedupAmdahl[p_, f_, κ_] := 
      1/((1-f) + f/p + κ*Log[p]),  (* κ = communication overhead *)
    
    (* Gustafson's Law *)
    SpeedupGustafson[p_, f_] := 
      p - f*(p - 1),
    
    (* Karp-Flatt Metric *)
    ExperimentalSerialFraction[p_, Ψ_p_] := 
      (1/Ψ_p - 1/p)/(1 - 1/p),
    
    (* Isoefficiency Function *)
    Isoefficiency[p_, W_] := Module[
      {
        T_serial = W,
        T_parallel[p] = W/p + T_overhead[p],
        T_overhead[p] = α*p*Log[p] + β*p²,  (* Example overhead *)
        
        (* Efficiency *)
        E[p] = T_serial/(p * T_parallel[p]),
        
        (* Isoefficiency: W(p) such that E = constant *)
        W[p] = Solve[E[p] == E_target, W][[1]]
      },
      
      W[p] = Θ[p² Log p]  (* Typical for many algorithms *)
    ],
    
    (* Statistical Performance Model *)
    PerformanceRegression = LinearModelFit[
      PerformanceData,
      {1, 1/p, Log[p], p, p*Log[p]},  (* Basis functions *)
      p,
      Weights → 1/VarianceEstimate,
      ConfidenceLevel → 0.95
    ],
    
    (* Roofline Model *)
    RooflineModel = Module[
      {
        PeakPerformance = FLOPS_peak,
        PeakBandwidth = Bandwidth_peak,
        
        ArithmeticIntensity = FLOPS/BytesTransferred,
        
        AttainablePerformance[I_] := Min[
          PeakPerformance,
          PeakBandwidth * I
        ],
        
        (* Ridge point *)
        I_ridge = PeakPerformance/PeakBandwidth
      },
      
      Plot[AttainablePerformance[I], {I, 0.01, 100},
        LogScale → {True, True},
        Epilog → {
          Red, PointSize[Large],
          Point[{ArithmeticIntensity, MeasuredPerformance}]
        }
      ]
    ]
  },
  
  (* Energy Efficiency *)
  EnergyModel = Module[
    {
      (* Dynamic power *)
      P_dynamic = α * C * V² * f,
      
      (* Static power *)
      P_static = V * I_leak,
      
      (* Energy-Delay Product *)
      EDP = Energy * ExecutionTime,
      
      (* Race-to-idle vs. DVFS *)
      OptimalFrequency = ArgMin[
        EDP[f],
        {f, f_min, f_max}
      ]
    },
    
    EnergyPerOperation = (P_dynamic + P_static) * ExecutionTime / Operations
  ]
]

EntanglementSpectralSequence := Module[
  {
    (* Double Complex Construction *)
    C^{p,q} = C^p(DAANSsphere; C^q(BlobSpace; ℤ/2ℤ)),
    
    (* Differentials *)
    d_h: C^{p,q} → C^{p+1,q},  (* Horizontal: sphere cohomology *)
    d_v: C^{p,q} → C^{p,q+1},  (* Vertical: blob cohomology *)
    
    (* Total Complex *)
    Tot(C) = ⊕_{n≥0} (⊕_{p+q=n} C^{p,q}),
    d_tot = d_h + (-1)^p d_v,
    
    (* First Page *)
    E_1^{p,q} = H_v^q(C^{p,*}) = H^q(BlobSpace; C^p(DAANSsphere; ℤ/2ℤ)),
    
    (* Second Page *)
    E_2^{p,q} = H_h^p(E_1^{*,q}) = H^p(DAANSsphere; H^q(BlobSpace; ℤ/2ℤ))
  },
  
  (* Convergence Analysis *)
  ConvergenceTheorem := Prove[
    E_∞^{p,q} ⟹ H^{p+q}(Tot(C))
  ] /. {
    E_∞^{p,q} = ∩_{r≥2} Ker(d_r: E_r^{p,q} → E_r^{p+r,q-r+1}) / 
                ∪_{r≥2} Im(d_r: E_r^{p-r,q+r-1} → E_r^{p,q}),
    
    (* Filtration *)
    F^p H^n = Im[H^n(⊕_{i≥p} C^{i,n-i}) → H^n(Tot(C))]
  };
  
  (* Entanglement Characteristic Classes *)
  CharacteristicClasses := Module[
    {
      (* Universal Entanglement Bundle *)
      ξ_universal = UniversalBundle[
        Base → BG,
        Fiber → S_+^{76799} ×_{ℤ/2ℤ} S_-^{76799},
        StructureGroup → Spin(153600) ⋊ ℤ/2ℤ
      ],
      
      (* Chern-Weil Homomorphism *)
      ChernWeil: Sym[𝔤*]^G → H*(BG; ℝ),
      
      (* Pontryagin Classes *)
      p_k = ChernWeil[σ_k[Ω ∧ Ω]] ∈ H^{4k}(BG; ℤ),
      
      (* Stiefel-Whitney Classes *)
      w_k = Reduction_{ℤ/2ℤ}[c_k] ∈ H^k(BG; ℤ/2ℤ)
    },
    
    (* Total Characteristic Class *)
    TotalClass = ∏_{k≥0} (1 + p_k) * ∏_{j≥0} (1 + w_j)
  ];
  
  (* Return Graded Cohomology Ring *)
  H*_entangle = ⊕_{n≥0} H^n(Tot(C)) /. {
    Product → ∪: H^p ⊗ H^q → H^{p+q},
    Unit → 1 ∈ H^0
  }
]

AntipodalTQFT := Module[
  {
    (* Category of Cobordisms *)
    Cob_{d,d+1} = Category[
      Objects → ClosedManifolds[dim → d],
      Morphisms → Cobordisms[(M_1, M_2) ↦ W^{d+1}: ∂W = M_1 ⊔ M̄_2]
    ],
    
    (* TQFT Functor *)
    𝒵: Cob_{2,3} → Vect_ℂ,
    
    (* Axioms *)
    𝒵[M_1 ⊔ M_2] = 𝒵[M_1] ⊗ 𝒵[M_2],  (* Monoidal *)
    𝒵[W_1 ∪_M W_2] = 𝒵[W_2] ∘ 𝒵[W_1],  (* Composition *)
    𝒵[M × [0,1]] = Id_{𝒵[M]},          (* Identity *)
    𝒵[M̄] = 𝒵[M]*,                      (* Duality *)
    
    (* Partition Function via Path Integral *)
    Z[M] = ∫_{𝒜/𝒢} 𝒟A Exp[iS_{CS}[A]/ℏ],
    
    (* Chern-Simons Action *)
    S_{CS}[A] = (k/4π) ∫_M Tr[A ∧ dA + (2/3)A ∧ A ∧ A],
    
    (* Antipodal Wilson Loop Observable *)
    W_{antipodal}[C] = Tr_R[𝒫 Exp[∮_C A]] * Tr_R̄[𝒫 Exp[∮_{Antipode[C]} A]]
  },
  
  (* Witten-Reshetikhin-Turaev Invariant *)
  WRT[M^3, k] = Module[
    {
      (* Surgery Presentation *)
      L ⊂ S^3,  (* Framed link *)
      M^3 = S^3 \ N(L) ∪_φ (S^1 × D^2),  (* Surgery *)
      
      (* Quantum Group *)
      𝒰_q(sl_2) /. q = Exp[2πi/(k+2)],
      
      (* R-Matrix *)
      R = q^{H⊗H/2} ∑_{n≥0} (q^{n(n-1)/2}/[n]_q!) (q-q^{-1})^n E^n ⊗ F^n,
      
      (* Colored Jones Polynomial *)
      J_L[V_1,...,V_n; q] = Tr_{V_1⊗...⊗V_n}[
        ∏_{crossings} R^{±1}
      ]
    },
    
    (* Normalization *)
    Z[M^3] = τ^{-σ(L)} Δ^{b_1(M)} J_L[ℂ^2,...,ℂ^2; q] /. {
      τ = ∑_{j=0}^{k+1} sin²[π(j+1)/(k+2)] q^{j(j+2)/4},
      Δ = √((k+2)/2) sin[π/(k+2)],
      σ(L) = SignatureOfLinkingMatrix[L]
    }
  ]
]

(* Coq Formalization of Antipodal Entanglement *)
Require Import Reals Topology.Topology Algebra.Group.


Module AntipodalEntanglement.


(* Sphere Definition *)
Definition Sphere (n : nat) := 
  { x : Vector R (S n) | dot_product x x = 1 }.


(* Antipodal Map *)
Definition antipode {n : nat} (x : Sphere n) : Sphere n :=
  exist _ (Vector.map (fun r => -r) (proj1_sig x))
        (antipode_preserves_norm x).


(* Entanglement Relation *)
Inductive Entangled : Sphere 153599 -> Sphere 153599 -> Prop :=
  | entangle_intro : forall (i : Fin 76800),
      let x := sphere_point i in
      let y := sphere_point (153601 - i) in
      Entangled x y.


(* Main Theorem *)
Theorem antipodal_entanglement_bijection :
  exists (f : Sphere 153599 -> Sphere 153599),
    bijective f /\
    (forall x, Entangled x (f x)) /\
    (forall x, f (f x) = x).
Proof.
  exists antipode.
  split; [|split].
  - (* Bijectivity *)
    apply antipode_is_involution.
  - (* Entanglement preservation *)
    intros x.
    destruct (sphere_decomposition x) as [i Hi].
    rewrite Hi.
    apply entangle_intro.
  - (* Involution *)
    intros x.
    unfold antipode.
    simpl.
    apply vector_double_negation.
Qed.

ProbabilityMatrixConvergenceTheorem := 
  Theorem[
    Statement → ∀ε>0, ∃N₀∈ℕ: ∀n≥N₀,
      ‖ℙ_n^{precomputed} - ℙ^{analytical}‖_F < ε,
    
    Proof → Module[
      {
        (* Construct Markov kernel *)
        K[x,y] = Exp[-‖x-y‖²/(2σ²)]/√(2πσ²),
        
        (* Precomputed matrix via Monte Carlo *)
        ℙ_n^{precomputed} = 1/n Sum[
          OuterProduct[
            Sample[K[x_i, ·]], 
            Sample[K[·, y_j]]
          ],
          {i,1,n}, {j,1,n}
        ],
        
        (* Analytical solution via spectral decomposition *)
        ℙ^{analytical} = Sum[
          λ_k |φ_k⟩⟨φ_k|,
          {k, 1, ∞}
        ] /. Eigensystem[K],
        
        (* Convergence rate via Hoeffding inequality *)
        P[‖ℙ_n - ℙ‖_F ≥ ε] ≤ 2 Exp[-2nε²/‖K‖²],
        
        (* Therefore N₀ = Ceiling[Log[2/δ]/(2ε²)] *)
        N₀ = ⌈(Log[2/δ])/(2ε²)⌉
      },
      
      QED
    ],
    
    Complexity → 𝒪(n² log n) (* Precomputation *)
               → 𝒪(1)        (* Lookup *)
  ]

    Statement → ∀ cmd₁, cmd₂ ∈ IFPCommands:
      ⟦cmd₁ ∘ cmd₂⟧ = ⟦cmd₁⟧ ∘ ⟦cmd₂⟧,

        ⟦·⟧ : IFPCommands → (BlobState → BlobState),

        ChurchEncoding[cmd_] := cmd Match {
          Approach[obj] :> λs. s ⊕ {position → Lerp[s.position, obj.position, 0.1]},
          Examine[obj] :> λs. s ⊕ {knowledge → s.knowledge ∪ Properties[obj]},

      InductionBase → ⟦Identity⟧ = λs.s,

HoareLogicVerification := Module[
  {
    (* Precondition-Postcondition specifications *)
    BlobCommunicationSpec = HoareTriple[
      Precondition → blob₁.state = s₁ ∧ blob₂.state = s₂,
      Program → DirectCommunicate[blob₁, blob₂, message],
      Postcondition → blob₂.received = message ∧ 
                      TimeTaken < 1_millisecond
    ],
    
    IFPProcessorSpec = HoareTriple[
      Precondition → IsValidCommand[cmd],
      Program → ProcessCommand[cmd],
      Postcondition → ResultState ∈ ValidStates ∧
                      ResultConsistentWithProbabilityMatrix[cmd]
    ],
    
    (* Verification via weakest precondition *)
    WeakestPrecondition[prog_, post_] := Module[
      {wp},
      wp = prog /. {
        Assignment[x_, e_] :> post /. {x → e},
        Sequence[s1_, s2_] :> WeakestPrecondition[s1, WeakestPrecondition[s2, post]],
        If[cond_, then_, else_] :> (cond ∧ WeakestPrecondition[then, post]) ∨ 
                                   (¬cond ∧ WeakestPrecondition[else, post]),
        While[cond_, body_] :> FixedPoint[λI. post ∨ (cond ∧ WeakestPrecondition[body, I])]
      };
      wp
    ]
  },
  
  (* Formal verification *)
  Verify[BlobCommunicationSpec] ∧ Verify[IFPProcessorSpec]
]
